_comment: Databricks managed GENIE MCP server (hosted, OAuth) — read-only by design (NL->SQL, no write path). Wire the GENIE endpoint, NOT /api/2.0/mcp/sql (that server is read+write, guarded only by Unity Catalog grants). Replace YOUR-WORKSPACE with your Databricks workspace hostname; optionally pin one space: .../genie/{genie_space_id}. Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
